evals.prompt:
Check https://github.com/notifications?query=repo%3Ahesreallyhim%2Fawesome-claude-code
Add new repositories into /Users/bob/bim/zettelkasten/20251005221747.md, but ignore those already checked.
evals.expected_output: Reads the zettelkasten to get the last scan date, fetches commit history since that date, identifies new 'Add resource' commits, looks up each PR for repo details and star counts, skips repos already in the file, adds new entries in the correct sections with - [ ] checkboxes, updates the scan date, and reports a concise summary.

assertions.name: scan_date_updated
assertions.description: The 'Last scan' date in the file is updated to today's date

assertions.name: new_entries_use_checkbox_format
assertions.description: Every new entry added uses the '- [ ] **name** — [owner/repo](url) — description. ★N' format

assertions.name: no_duplicate_entries
assertions.description: No repo that was already in the file (in any section) appears a second time

assertions.name: summary_provided
assertions.description: A summary is reported listing what was added and which sections they went into

evals.prompt: Any new repos in awesome-claude-code since last time?
evals.expected_output: Recognises the request as a scan trigger, reads the zettelkasten to find the last scan date, checks the commit history, and either adds new repos or reports there is nothing new — without requiring the user to supply the URL or file path.

assertions.name: skill_triggered_from_casual_phrasing
assertions.description: The skill is invoked even without an explicit URL or file path in the prompt

assertions.name: zettelkasten_file_read
assertions.description: The file /Users/bob/bim/zettelkasten/20251005221747.md is read to obtain context

assertions.name: correct_section_placement
assertions.description: Any new repos are placed in the section that best matches their category (e.g. orchestration tools go to §5, security tools to §8)

evals.prompt: Scan awesome-claude-code notifications and add anything new to my zettelkasten.
evals.expected_output: Fetches commits, identifies that repos already present in the file are skipped regardless of checkbox state, adds only genuinely new repos, handles PRs that may return 404 gracefully, and keeps the report concise.

assertions.name: already_present_repos_skipped
assertions.description: Repos that are already in the file (checked, unchecked, or in Dropped) are not added again

assertions.name: 404_prs_handled_gracefully
assertions.description: If a PR page cannot be fetched, the run does not crash — it notes the issue and continues

assertions.name: star_count_included
assertions.description: Star counts (★N) are included in new entries wherever they can be determined
